2071734524749180943.full_text:
A criminal case has been registered against Shashank Singh and his father 🚨 

- The complainant, Vipendra Singh Tomar (31) from worked as a cook at Shashank’s family’s residence in Mendori village.

- He was brought to Bhopal through an acquaintance and was promised ₹15,000 monthly salary, free lodging and food at the bungalow of the former IPS officer (Shashank Singh’s father), and help in securing a government job.

- He faced mental pressure and verbal abuse within hours of starting the job, allegedly over dissatisfaction with the quality of food prepared.

- He faced assault, verbal abuse, and illegal confinement, which form the basis of the FIR.

- The FIR also names the family’s driver as a co-accused, who is currently under investigation by Ratibad Police. [ANI]
